title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMBarrier
description: Barriers and physical obstructions from OpenStreetMap tagged with barrier=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMBarrier

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

barrierType.description: Property. The OSM barrier tag classifying the obstruction. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:barrier'

access.description: Property. Access restrictions for the barrier or gate. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:access'

height.description: Property. Height of the barrier in metres. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:height'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
